steps.title: Track the timeline
steps.content: The first sentence describes Herrera winning a storytelling competition in 2014. The second describes him creating a show in 2017. The transition must show that the second event happened after the first.

steps.title: Reject nonchronological links
steps.content: Choice A signals replacement, but the 2017 event does not replace the 2014 one. Choice B signals an example. Choice D signals restatement, but the two sentences describe different events.

steps.title: Choose the time transition
steps.content: Later correctly marks the 2017 show as an event that occurred after Herrera's 2014 competition win. The answer is C.
